top_signals.title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Angst
top_signals.summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concern over accelerating inflation fueled a selloff in global debt markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Jeff Currie Says AI Boom Sets Up Commodities for Decade-Long Run
top_signals.summary: Veteran strategist Jeff Currie said the world is in the early stages of a commodity supercycle that may last another decade or more as the artificial intelligence buildout collides with chronic underinvestment in energy and materials capacity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
